case_title: MENDOZA SALVADOR VS LORENZANA RONY IND DBA LORNZANA S HOME PAINTING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $960.00 FILED BY MENDOZA SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT LORENZANA RONY IND DBA LORNZANA S HOME PAINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
